title: Allure
description: Client-side overhaul for vanilla servers and worlds.
body:
Allure is a client-side modpack. This pack was made with the intention of being able to connect to vanilla servers. It provides a visual, auditory, performance, and quality of life overhaul. 

### Highlights
- Sodium, Iris Shaders, etc. emulate most of the features of Optifine within fabric,
- Mousewheelie adds inventory sorting,
- Visuality, Falling Leaves, and others add visual enhancements,
- Grid, ClickThrough, and ClientHarvest provide useful features.
